description: Anchor lens for the Greek concept of epignosis (ἐπίγνωσις) — experiential, relational, and participatory knowing. Distinct from the systematic episteme and the insight-comprehension synesis. Grounds in logos.epignosis.experiential via grc-core-cog-007 (cross_lang.logos.epignosis.en edge, weight 0.78; ADR-0073a documents the English-collapse: 'experiential_to_english_collapse'). Cognitive mode: experiential-knowledge.
